sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66420" key="meso/braxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-βρᾰχυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>, <sense id="n66420.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a short syllable in the middle</tr_>, name of the foot <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">̄̄̆̄̄</pron>, Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:p.481" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.481</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
